intro: Outside of research and code, I make a genuine effort to maintain a life that isn't entirely pixels and terminals.

items.name: Reading
items.description: Non-fiction, philosophy, and the occasional psychological thriller. Currently reading Thinking, Fast and Slow.

items.name: Chess
items.description: ~1800 Elo on Lichess. Always up for a friendly blitz match.

items.name: Guitar
items.description: Fingerpicking acoustic. Currently working through Tommy Emmanuel pieces.

items.name: Running
items.description: 5K three times a week. Slow, but consistent and proud of it.

items.name: Travel
items.description: Visited 8 countries so far. Next destination on the list: Japan.

items.name: Cooking
items.description: Mostly Bengali and Italian. A good biryani is non-negotiable.
